title: hypecoum procumbens subsp. atropunctatum
intro: Hypecoum procumbens subsp. atropunctatum, also known as yellow rocket or yellow rocketwort, is a perennial plant belonging to the poppy family (Papaveraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, thanks to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits also include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system. Hypecoum procumbens subsp. atropunctatum can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health conditions.
